_doc: THROWAWAY ground-truth spec (Phase-4 chip 3b, ckpt 117). Reads the per-entity MOVE-TUNING constants 0x442a70 uses for the JUMP off Arche's entity (in_ECX[idx] = entity byte idx*4; the command block in_ECX+0x14854 = int 0x5215 = byte 0x14854 confirms the *4 scale). Resolves the index->constant provenance that the bit-exact arc pins by VALUE only (impulse -80000, rise-held grav 8000, fall grav 4000) and captures the two UNOBSERVED consts: the terminal-velocity clamp + the short-hop (jump-released) rise grav. Entity chain = the leader chain [room_state 0x2784, leader-slot 0x200c, entity 0x9f4] (stop at the entity, off = idx*4). Drive: nav to settled freeroam (jump-ring.jsonl), read a few frames ~4555. RUN: frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/runjump-gt/jump-ring.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/jump_consts_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --call-trace-frames 4554,4556,4558,4560 --run-dir runs/runjump-gt/capconsts.

0x5b8fc0.name: arche_tuning
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 Flip (once/frame). Leader-chain to Arche's ENTITY (code 0xc35a) + the 0x442a70 move-tuning consts read as in_ECX[idx] (byte idx*4).

fields.name: c_5668
fields.reason: in_ECX[0x5668] (442a70:862) RISE grav, jump HELD; expect 8000

fields.name: c_5669
fields.reason: in_ECX[0x5669] (442a70:859/865) RISE grav, jump RELEASED (short-hop); UNOBSERVED

fields.name: c_565b
fields.reason: in_ECX[0x565b] (442a70:950) FALL grav (my read)=4000 vs ckpt-115 walk-cap hypothesis=24000

fields.name: c_565e
fields.reason: in_ECX[0x565e] (442a70:951) TERMINAL velocity (my read) vs ckpt-115 walk-brake hypothesis=800
